title: Unidentified flying lizard
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Species |image=[[File:DanorFlyingLizard-JourneyAcrossPanetX.jpg]] |name=Unidentified flying lizard |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Semi-sentient]]''[[Star Wars Science Adventures: Journey Across Planet X]]'' |class=[[Lizard/Legends|Lizard]] |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor=[[Color/Legends|Iridescent]] |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor=Yellow |distinctions=*[[Ectothermy|Ectothermic]] *Two wings |lifespan= |origin=[[Da'nor]] |habitat= |diet=[[Diet/Legends|Herbivorous]] |language= }} {{Quote|These lizards must have a superior form of intelligence, even if they can't communicate. They must have figured out we want to go back to our own kind.|4B-X|}} The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Da'nor]] was [[Homeworld/Legends|home]] to a [[Sentience/Legends|semi-sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of '''flying lizard'''. These [[Lizard/Legends|lizards]] were [[Ectothermy|ectothermic]], and they were distinguished by a set of wings and [[Color/Legends|iridescent]] skin. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], a small group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] crash-landed on Da'nor, and one of the members, twelve-[[Standard year/Legends|year]]-old [[Stuart Zissu]], was accompanied by a lizard as [[Gender/Legends|he]] journeyed across the planet. ==Biology and appearance== {{Quote|I can feel its heartbeat. But it's so cold and still.''"
"''That's because it's a cold-blooded creature.|Stuart Zissu and 4B-X|}} [[File:Varada_sector.jpg|thumb|right|240px|The lizards were native to the Varada sector.]] The [[Species/Legends|species]] of flying [[Lizard/Legends|lizard]] resided on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Da'nor]], located in the [[Varada sector/Legends|Varada sector]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} Native to the planet's [[Temperature/Legends|warm]] equatorial region, the lizards were [[Ectothermy|ectotherms]], and they had a single [[Heart/Legends|heart]]. They had wings that folded back against their bodies, and they had [[Color/Legends|iridescent]] skin, which shone green, yellow, and purple. The lizards were not very large when compared to [[Human/Legends|Humans]]. ==Behavior and intelligence== Although not [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]], the lizards possessed a superior form of intelligence, and could communicate by emitting a series of loud screeches and shrieks. This communication allowed them to warn of attacks from predator species, such as large [[Bird/Legends|birds]]. ==History== {{Quote|Are you okay, little fellow?''"
"''Him? What about ''us''?|Stuart Zissu and C-3PO, after surviving a bird attack|}} In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] holding a small group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]]—twelve-[[Standard year/Legends|year]]-old Human [[Stuart Zissu]] and the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], [[4B-X]], and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]—crash-landed on Da'nor. After landing, Zissu discovered one of the lizards frozen to the escape pod's wing, and 4B-X theorized that it had been snared by the pod as it flew over a warmer region. Knowing that the lizard would [[Death/Legends|die]] in the colder climate, Zissu kept the creature and nursed it back to health. ==Behind the scenes== [[File:DanorFlyingLizard.jpg|thumb|right|200px|A flying lizard is featured on the cover of ''Journey Across Planet X''.]] The flying lizards first appeared in the [[1999]] junior novel ''[[Star Wars Science Adventures: Journey Across Planet X]]'', which was written by [[Jude Watson]] and [[K.D. Burkett]]. One of the lizards is featured on the book's cover. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars Science Adventures: Journey Across Planet X]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of unidentified flying lizards}} {{Reflist}} [[Category:Creatures of the Varada sector]] [[Category:Ectothermic species]] [[Category:Flying creatures]] [[Category:Herbivorous creatures]] [[Category:Jungle and forest creatures]] [[Category:Reptiles]] [[Category:Semi-sentient species]]
